name: ChromBPNet / variant-scorer
description: Framework to score genetic variant effects genome-wide using ChromBPNet models. ChromBPNet is a bias-factorized, base-resolution deep learning model of chromatin accessibility. Identifies cis-regulatory sequence syntax, TF footprints, and regulatory variant effects. Has been applied to autism and intellectual disability variant analysis (JARID2 as target gene identified through variant scoring).

publication.title: ChromBPNet: bias factorized, base-resolution deep learning models of chromatin accessibility reveal cis-regulatory sequence syntax, transcription factor footprints and regulatory variants

relevance_to_atlas: HIGH - Direct application to autism noncoding variant scoring. Used in published autism regulatory analysis pipeline. Compatible with the atlas's focus on TF binding disruption (complementary to varTFBridge). Well-documented and cell-type matched scoring supports atlas goals.
